hooks.command: r="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ -x "$r/scripts/o2b-hook" ]; then exec "$r/scripts/o2b-hook" session-capture; fi; command -v o2b-hook >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec o2b-hook session-capture; exit 0
